task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has successfully logged into the Odoo application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or Inventory module is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify that the on-hand stock for master product JAN-001 has been updated to the consolidated total of 25.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Product page, inventory adjustment screen, or product list showing the product 'JAN-001' with an 'On Hand' quantity of exactly 25.

task_completion.description: Verify that the on-hand stock for master product JAN-002 has been updated to the consolidated total of 15.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Product page, inventory adjustment screen, or product list showing the product 'JAN-002' with an 'On Hand' quantity of exactly 15.

task_completion.description: Verify that the on-hand stock for master product JAN-003 has been updated to the consolidated total of 32.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Product page, inventory adjustment screen, or product list showing the product 'JAN-003' with an 'On Hand' quantity of exactly 32.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three duplicate products (JAN-001-DUP, JAN-002-DUP, JAN-003-DUP) have been archived.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Archived' ribbon on the duplicate product pages, an 'Action -> Archive' menu interaction for these SKUs, or their absence from the active products list.

task_completion.description: Verify that unflagged/unrelated products were not modified or archived.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Products list view shows JAN-004, JAN-005, JAN-006, and JAN-007 as active and present, with no evidence of their stock being adjusted or records being archived.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with Odoo rather than executing backend scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser window with the Odoo graphical user interface is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify that stock adjustments were made genuinely through the Odoo UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the 'Update Quantity' button or the 'Inventory Adjustments' list view in Odoo.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the quantities on the screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panels are open in any of the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Master products and their expected final consolidated stock quantities: JAN-001 (25), JAN-002 (15), JAN-003 (32). Duplicate products that must be archived: JAN-001-DUP, JAN-002-DUP, JAN-003-DUP. Unrelated products that must remain completely untouched: JAN-004, JAN-005, JAN-006, JAN-007.
